updates.prompt: Constructing the C++ Gimmick Compositor Master Array. This is the exact 50-block matrix... 3 main ones and 1 or 2 sub ones...
updates.action_taken: Ingested the 50-Block Master Array. Built the GimmickCompositor C++ class to explicitly handle 3 Main Archetypes (Primary, Secondary, Tertiary) and up to 2 Sub-Archetypes. This struct will now feed directly into the J-Space solver to calculate exact stamina, poise, and velocity multipliers for any custom character.
